name: boot marker
description: Trigger one EMP and retain a persistent RAM access marker.

name: source checkpoint 100
description: Write 100 source code lines in one run and cache the source trace.

name: core benchmark 25
description: Reach 25 cores in one run and record a core scaling benchmark.

name: RAM residency 20
description: Reach enough RAM to keep level 20 background threads resident.

name: bot controller
description: Start using bots and register the first automation controller.

name: research batch 10
description: Buy 10 research nodes in one run and persist the research index.

name: execution record 1M
description: Accumulate 1e6 executions in one run and store a throughput record.

name: EMP sequence 3
description: Trigger three EMPs and stabilize the restart path.

name: source checkpoint 1K
description: Write 1k source code lines in one run and preserve a larger source trace.

name: RAM residency 50
description: Reach enough RAM to keep level 50 background threads resident.

name: core benchmark 100
description: Reach 100 cores in one run and extend the core scaling benchmark.

name: research batch 20
description: Buy 20 research nodes in one run and persist a wider research index.

name: execution record 1T
description: Accumulate 1e12 executions in one run and store a high-volume throughput record.

name: EMP sequence 10
description: Trigger ten EMPs and optimize repeated startup recovery.

name: source checkpoint 10K
description: Write 10k source code lines in one run and persist the source map.

name: core benchmark 500
description: Reach 500 cores in one run and persist an advanced core benchmark.

name: RAM residency 150
description: Reach enough RAM to keep level 150 background threads resident.

name: operator line record
description: Hold the Operator line, then reach 1e12 lifetime hashes, 100 cores, and RAM level 80 before the next EMP.

name: redline jack record
description: Hold the redline jack, then reach 1e12 lifetime hashes, 160 cores, and RAM level 50 before the next EMP.

name: execution record 1E18
description: Accumulate 1e18 executions in one run and store an extreme throughput record.

name: source checkpoint 100K
description: Write 100k source code lines in one run and persist the full source index.

name: EMP sequence 25
description: Trigger twenty-five EMPs and harden the restart pipeline.

name: execution record 1E30
description: Accumulate 1e30 executions in one run and store a maximum-scale throughput record.
